title: The Most Ideal Batting Lineup for the 2026 Chicago Cubs
description: A multi-source sabermetric analysis of the 2026 Chicago Cubs roster. Uses the Hungarian algorithm to optimally assign players to batting spots 1-6, scored across OBP, SLG, WAR, RC/G, SecA and more. Includes interactive charts, per-player profiles, and a full methodology writeup.

title: Rebuilding the 2026 Chicago White Sox
description: A WAR-based valuation model for rebuilding the 2026 Chicago White Sox. Combines $/WAR surplus valuation, a Gaussian revenue-maximization curve, playing-time reallocation, and a wOBA-weighted optimal lineup using The Book's leverage heuristic.
